data.content: Plan: (1) Add knotsLeaseId to ActiveTerminal+TerminalSession alongside existing 4 fields. (2) Server populates knotsLeaseId on session after acquireKnotsLease, plus optional knotsAgentInfo from lease's autostamped agent_info. (3) Add useTerminalAgentInfo hook that maps sessionId/leaseId to canonical agent identity by reading TerminalSession[] from existing backend poll. (4) Migrate useAgentInfoMap.overrideFromTerminals to consume hook. (5) Drop the 4 fields from ActiveTerminal+TerminalSession+writers. (6) Update tests. Spawn sites: use-ship-beat, use-scene-manager. Hook resolves from server response since lease info is already round-tripped through rehydrateFromBackend. Approvals stay separate (different store).
